definition: loop integral of rho(T,p,property lane) g dz over the solved 1D field
admission_use: predictive term if computed from setup and solved temperatures
guardrail: do not reduce to a global mdot-only drive term

definition: distributed and developing straight-section loss with reset distance and source status
admission_use: fit only on admitted single-stream rows with same-QOI uncertainty
guardrail: do not fit F6 from recirculating upcomer/corner rows

definition: additional local loss after hydrostatic, kinetic, and straight/developing corrections
admission_use: diagnostic unless component isolation, recovery, velocity basis, and source envelope pass
guardrail: do not call section/cluster rows universal component K

definition: section-effective residual where local exchange invalidates one bulk stream
admission_use: model-form diagnostic or hybrid candidate only after guard lane
guardrail: do not clip negative K or hide in global multiplier

definition: electrical/setup heater power transferred to fluid or wall according to admitted source contract
admission_use: heater efficiency currently admitted as boundary evidence, not broad final freeze
guardrail: do not use realized scored-row heater heat at runtime

admission_use: cooler/HX UA currently admitted as boundary evidence
guardrail: do not use imposed CFD cooler duty at runtime

definition: wall/layer/external convection/radiation resistance network outside active source/sink regions
admission_use: blocked until wall/test-section/passive-boundary thermal-shape gate passes
guardrail: do not absorb passive-wall residual into internal Nu

definition: bare-quartz source/loss balance retained as physical middle upcomer span
admission_use: blocked until setup-only coupled candidate passes held-out gates
guardrail: do not delete test section or use realized net test-section heat

admission_use: diagnostic or future setup-facing model depending on geometry/material ownership
guardrail: do not smear junction/stub heat into ordinary pipe UA

definition: internal convection candidate or diagnostic reference
admission_use: fit only after sign, heat-balance, recirculation, source-envelope, and same-QOI UQ gates
guardrail: do not let Nu absorb heater, cooler, passive, radiation, or storage error

definition: remaining imbalance after declared heat lanes are evaluated
admission_use: diagnostic until a physical lane is admitted
